commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow mechanical repair can update the stack-frame detector and tests without a product decision.; Needs attention: the suffix-delivery branch can expose async V8 stack-frame paths because the regex does not match frames with the async prefix.; Review finding: [P1] Reject async V8 stack frames before appending suffix prose — src/agents/embedded-agent-helpers/sanitize-user-facing-text.ts:420 (sha=f21b0c62a1fb09eed10e1dc8edba455ae39b58fa)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `sanitizeUserFacingText` to classify a leading error-prefix line, append safe multiline prose, reject stack/JSON/HTML suffixes, and add focused sanitizer regression tests.

PR surface: Source +87, Tests +233. Total +320 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the sanitizer path and PR defect: current main rewrites prefixed error-context text, and the PR regex probe shows async stack frames are not detected before suffix append. No live Discord roundtrip was run.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow mechanical repair can update the stack-frame detector and tests without a product decision.

target.title: fix(sanitize): preserve user-visible prose after error-prefix lines
target.author: jiashu6
